ddls:
CREATE TABLE "respondents" (
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the respondent */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the respondent */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the respondent */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the respondent */,
  "income_poverty" TEXT /* Income relative to poverty level */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the respondent */,
  "rent_or_own" TEXT /* Whether the respondent rents or owns their home */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the respondent */,
  "census_msa" TEXT /* Census Metropolitan Statistical Area */,
  "household_adults" INTEGER /* Number of adults in the household */,
  "household_children" INTEGER /* Number of children in the household */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the respondent for follow-up communication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the respondent for follow-up communication */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the respondent for more precise age calculations */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the respondent for more detailed geographic analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("respondent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respondents_census_msa FOREIGN KEY ("census_msa") REFERENCES census_data ("census_msa")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_history" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the respondent */,
  "seasonal_vaccine" INTEGER /* Whether the respondent received a seasonal flu vaccine (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "doctor_recc_h1n1" INTEGER /* Whether the respondent received a recommendation for H1N1 vaccine from a doctor (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "doctor_recc_seasonal" INTEGER /* Whether the respondent received a recommendation for seasonal flu vaccine from a doctor (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date when the respondent received the vaccine */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine received (e.g., Pfizer, Moderna, Johnson & Johnson) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_history_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "concerns_and_knowledge" (
  "concern_knowledge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each concern and knowledge record */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the respondent */,
  "h1n1_concern" INTEGER /* Level of concern about H1N1 (1-5, 1 = Not Concerned, 5 = Very Concerned) */,
  "h1n1_knowledge" INTEGER /* Level of knowledge about H1N1 (1-3, 1 = Low, 3 = High) */,
  "seasonal_concern" INTEGER /* Level of concern about seasonal flu (1-5, 1 = Not Concerned, 5 = Very Concerned) */,
  "seasonal_knowledge" INTEGER /* Level of knowledge about seasonal flu (1-3, 1 = Low, 3 = High) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("concern_knowledge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_concerns_and_knowledge_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "behavioral_practices" (
  "behavior_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each behavioral practice record */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the respondent */,
  "behavioral_antiviral_meds" INTEGER /* Whether the respondent took antiviral medications (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "behavioral_avoidance" INTEGER /* Whether the respondent avoided close contact (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "behavioral_face_mask" INTEGER /* Whether the respondent used a face mask (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "behavioral_wash_hands" INTEGER /* Whether the respondent washed hands frequently (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "behavioral_large_gatherings" INTEGER /* Whether the respondent avoided large gatherings (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "behavioral_outside_home" INTEGER /* Whether the respondent reduced outside home activities (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "behavioral_touch_face" INTEGER /* Whether the respondent avoided touching face (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "behavioral_social_distancing" INTEGER /* Whether the respondent practiced social distancing (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "behavioral_self_isolation" INTEGER /* Whether the respondent self-isolated if feeling unwell (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("behavior_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_behavioral_practices_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_status" (
  "health_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health status record */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the respondent */,
  "chronic_med_condition" INTEGER /* Whether the respondent has a chronic medical condition (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "child_under_6_months" INTEGER /* Whether the respondent has a child under 6 months (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "health_worker" INTEGER /* Whether the respondent is a healthcare worker (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "health_insurance" INTEGER /* Whether the respondent has health insurance (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "chronic_conditions_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the chronic medical conditions (e.g., diabetes, asthma, heart disease) */,
  "health_insurance_type" TEXT /* Type of health insurance (e.g., Medicaid, Medicare, Private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_status_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opinions_h1n1" (
  "opinion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opinion record */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the respondent */,
  "opinion_h1n1_vacc_effective" INTEGER /* Opinion on the effectiveness of H1N1 vaccine (1-5, 1 = Not Effective, 5 = Very Effective) */,
  "opinion_h1n1_risk" INTEGER /* Opinion on the risk of H1N1 (1-5, 1 = Low Risk, 5 = High Risk) */,
  "opinion_h1n1_sick_from_vacc" INTEGER /* Opinion on the risk of getting sick from H1N1 vaccine (1-5, 1 = Low Risk, 5 = High Risk) */,
  "opinion_h1n1_trust" INTEGER /* Trust in the H1N1 vaccine (1-5, 1 = Not Trustworthy, 5 = Very Trustworthy) */,
  "opinion_h1n1_side_effects" INTEGER /* Concern about side effects of H1N1 vaccine (1-5, 1 = Not Concerned, 5 = Very Concerned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opinion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opinions_h1n1_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opinions_seasonal" (
  "opinion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opinion record */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the respondent */,
  "opinion_seas_vacc_effective" INTEGER /* Opinion on the effectiveness of seasonal flu vaccine (1-5, 1 = Not Effective, 5 = Very Effective) */,
  "opinion_seas_risk" INTEGER /* Opinion on the risk of seasonal flu (1-5, 1 = Low Risk, 5 = High Risk) */,
  "opinion_seas_sick_from_vacc" INTEGER /* Opinion on the risk of getting sick from seasonal flu vaccine (1-5, 1 = Low Risk, 5 = High Risk) */,
  "opinion_seas_trust" INTEGER /* Trust in the seasonal flu vaccine (1-5, 1 = Not Trustworthy, 5 = Very Trustworthy) */,
  "opinion_seas_side_effects" INTEGER /* Concern about side effects of seasonal flu vaccine (1-5, 1 = Not Concerned, 5 = Very Concerned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opinion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opinions_seasonal_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of the question (e.g., multiple choice, scale) */,
  "options" TEXT /* Options or scale values for the question */,
  "question_category" TEXT /* Category of the question (e.g., Vaccination, Concerns, Behaviors) */,
  "question_importance" INTEGER /* Importance of the question in the survey (1-5, 1 = Low, 5 = High) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the respondent */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the question */,
  "response_value" TEXT /* Value of the response */,
  "response_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the response was recorded */,
  "response_confidence" INTEGER /* Confidence level of the respondent in their response (1-5, 1 = Not Confident, 5 = Very Confident) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES survey_questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "census_data" (
  "census_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each census record */,
  "census_msa" TEXT /* Census Metropolitan Statistical Area */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the area */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income in the area */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Average education level in the area */,
  "healthcare_access" TEXT /* Access to healthcare facilities in the area */,
  "census_year" INTEGER /* Year of the census data */,
  "census_population" INTEGER /* Total population in the area */,
  "census_housing_units" INTEGER /* Total number of housing units in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("census_id")
)
